chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 1334 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA No.3262/2023. 17.12.2025 Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for the applicant. Ms. Saima Syed, advocate for the respondent. Pursuant to order dated 05.11.2025, learned counsel for the respondent states that it may be just and proper to set aside the impugned judgment and remand the matter to the Appellate Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law preferable within 90 days. Learned counsel further states that pending aforesaid, no coercive action be taken against the respondent. Counsel for the applicant states that the reference application may be disposed of in the aforesaid terms. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
